turns.caller_utterance: Hi, I want to apply for a Lendingkart business loan online.
What documents do I usually need for the loan application?
What processing fee will I need to pay?
The interest and charges sound expensive. What fees should I know before applying?
Someone claiming to be from Lendingkart asked me to pay money before disbursal. Is that safe?
Can a human advisor call me later to confirm this?
What happens if I miss an EMI payment?
I cannot share all details right now but want to know if I am eligible.
Please connect me to a human representative.
